title: Principal Frontend Developer at Unisys India Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Principal Frontend Developer at Unisys India Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
Unisys India Holdings Services, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Frontend Developer for our Kolkata operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Unisys India Holdings Services:
Unisys India Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Unisys India Holdings Services!
